title: Settings
subtitle: Manage your account preferences and notifications.

account.title: Account Settings
account.profile_picture_help: Upload a JPG, PNG, or WEBP image for your FullParty account. This does not change any character portraits.
account.profile_picture_invalid_format: Please choose a JPG, PNG, or WEBP image.
account.profile_picture_too_large: Profile pictures must be 5 MB or smaller.

unlink_social_account_description: This will unlink {provider} from your FullParty account.
unlink_social_account_warning: You will be able to link it again later if needed.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.autosave_failed: We could not save those notification settings. Please try again.
notifications.categories_description: Choose which kinds of product activity should create notifications for you.
notifications.delivery_description: Choose which extra channels FullParty can use for eligible notifications.
notifications.discord_app_description: Connect the FullParty Discord app to receive supported Discord notifications and use group Discord features.
notifications.discord_app_connected_description: FullParty can send supported Discord notifications to this account.
notifications.discord_app_not_connected_description: Connect the Discord app to enable Discord delivery and bot-powered group features.
notifications.customize_description: Choose which parts of this notification group should use each delivery channel.
notifications.applications_description: Application review outcomes, withdrawals, cancellations, and other signup-related changes.
notifications.assignments_description: Roster and bench updates once your status is actually published to you.
notifications.runs_and_reminders_description: New run announcements, important run changes, reminders, and check-in timing.
notifications.group_updates_description: Invites, membership changes, and other important updates from your groups.
notifications.account_character_updates_description: Character verification, imports, claim flow updates, and account-related status changes.
notifications.system_notices_description: Critical maintenance and outage notices are always sent. This toggle only controls optional product updates, feature announcements, and project status news.
notifications.discord_notifications_description: Send notifications through the FullParty Discord app

applications_submitted.title: My submitted applications
applications_submitted.description: Confirmations when you submit, withdraw, or change your own application.

applications_review.title: New applications to review
applications_review.description: New applications waiting for a run host to review.

applications_host_updates.title: Application updates for my runs
applications_host_updates.description: Edits and withdrawals from applicants on runs you host.

assignments_roster.title: Roster placement
assignments_roster.description: Assigned, published, removed, or returned-to-queue roster changes.

assignments_bench.title: Bench status
assignments_bench.description: Updates when you are placed on the bench.

assignments_designations.title: Run duties
assignments_designations.description: Host and raid leader designation changes.

runs_reminders.title: Run reminders
runs_reminders.description: Starting soon and starting now reminders.

group_run_posts.title: Group run posts
group_run_posts.description: Draft and scheduled run updates from your groups.

group_membership.title: Membership activity
group_membership.description: Members joining, leaving, or being removed.

group_roles.title: Group roles and ownership
group_roles.description: Promotion, demotion, and ownership transfer updates.

connected_accounts.title: Connected accounts
connected_accounts.description: Social account link and unlink updates.

account_settings.title: Account security
account_settings.description: Password, username, privacy, and notification settings changes.

character_changes.title: Character changes
character_changes.description: Characters added, made primary, or removed from your account.

character_refreshes.title: Character refreshes
character_refreshes.description: Profile data refreshes from your linked character sources.

system_maintenance.title: Critical maintenance
system_maintenance.description: Maintenance and outage notices that FullParty always sends.

system_announcements.title: Product announcements
system_announcements.description: Optional product updates, feature news, and project notices.

notifications.discord_link_token_expires: Share this token with the FullParty Discord bot. It expires {date}.
notifications.discord_link_token_active: A link token is active until {date}. Generate a new one if you need to see it again.
notifications.disconnect_discord_confirm: Disconnect Discord from your FullParty account? FullParty will stop using Discord for your account, but you still need to remove the app inside Discord if you want it fully gone.

disconnect_discord_modal.title: Disconnect Discord
disconnect_discord_modal.description: FullParty will stop using Discord for your account and turn off Discord notifications.
disconnect_discord_modal.warning: This does not remove the app from Discord. To fully remove it, open Discord settings, go to Authorized Apps, and remove FullParty.

privacy.title: Privacy & Security
privacy.profile_visibility_description: Make your profile visible to other users
privacy.show_character_data_description: Display job levels and progression on your profile
privacy.delete_account_description: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. Please be certain.
privacy.delete_account_owner_blocked: Transfer or delete your owned groups before deleting your account.

delete_account_modal.title: Delete account
delete_account_modal.description: This will close your FullParty account and sign you out immediately.
delete_account_modal.warning: Sign-in access and live account state will be removed. Historical group and run records will be kept.

toasts.notification_preferences_reviewed: Notification preferences reviewed. Account setup updated.
toasts.social_account_unlink_blocked: Add another sign-in method or set a password before unlinking your last social account.
toasts.social_oauth_invalid_state: That connection attempt expired. Please try connecting the account again.
toasts.title: Success!
